---
title: "His Grace Frederick Temple"
---

## His Grace Frederick Temple

**Dates:** (1821-1902)

### Description

Archbishop of Canterbury

### Biography

He was successively headmaster of Rugby (1857);  Bishop  of Exeter(1869); Bishop of London(1885); then Archbishop  of Canterbury (1896).

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 17 th 1894
- Letter from Jan 31st  [1870]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
